frame_analyses.description: Initial grasp of the gauze with two instruments.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Stable grip on gauze, initiating cut on marked line.
Scissors used at appropriate angle, cutting commenced at the circle edge.

frame_analyses.description: Cutting around the lower arc of the circle.

penalties_observed.description: Approx. 3mm deviation near the 6 o'clock position.

frame_analyses.description: Cut completed with separation of gauze from template.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Complete separation achieved, minor unevenness on outer edge.

penalties_observed.description: Approx. 2mm deviation noted at 3 o'clock position.

penalties.description: Deviation in cutting line at specific points.

confidence_rationale: Most deviations were observed directly; however, visibility at times was impacted by instrument occlusion.
cannot_determine: Exact mm measurement at all cardinal points due to instrument overlap.
technique_summary: Consistent intermediate performance with smooth cutting but some deviation.
strengths: No gauze detachment from the pins
improvement_suggestions: Increase precision to minimize deviation from marked line.
